$source-of-truth: docs/sprint-progress.json. Updated as agents return + commit. Read by apps/portal/Components/Pages/Sprint.razor.

currentSprint.name: G2 — NickFinance Petty Cash pathfinder
currentSprint.goal: First NickFinance module pathfinder: Petty Cash. Money primitive, voucher state machine, ledger event projection, period locks, FX. Binding spec in docs/product-calls-2026-04-29.md §1.

items.title: NickFinance Petty Cash pathfinder (single-agent, ~5–7 days)
items.notes: Money value object, per-box currency, Request→Approve→Disburse→Reconcile, per-box approver, single-entry append-only ledger, soft period locks, FX snapshot on every event, daily-manual FX publish (suite-wide). Binding spec: docs/product-calls-2026-04-29.md §1.

currentSprintNote: Sprint 10 — G2 NickFinance Petty Cash pathfinder. Sprint 9 (Followup-2 sweep) shipped end-to-end at 4c05b5d.

resolvedDecisions.title: ITenantContext.SetSystemContext mechanism
resolvedDecisions.resolution: option 2 — explicit IsSystem flag + SetSystemContext() + sentinel '-1' + per-table RLS opt-in clauses + system-context audit register

rollingMasterScope.drainableNote: Sprint 10 (G2) is in-flight as currentSprint. After G2 lands, P2 (edge node SQLite buffer + replay) is the last drainable. Specs in docs/product-calls-2026-04-29.md.

outOfScope.reason: User-driven; spawns its own master run when ready. Heads-up: untracked IInboundOutcomeAdapter.cs may reference the old AuthorityDocument DTO name — rename to AuthorityDocumentDto (FU-7) when resuming. docs/IMAGE-ANALYSIS-MODERNIZATION.md is the design source. Stash@{0} preserved with parallel inference DbSet edits to InspectionDbContext.cs + Modelsnapshot.cs (conflict resolution from FU-icums-signing took main; user reconciles when resuming).
